message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-f8gi1 (Multi*.nodes() live NodeView)

Fixed in commit 0fe69d0. _node_view_call_with_attr_support now
returns ``self`` (the live NodeView) for default args across all
four graph classes, sidestepping the Rust-side variance where
MultiGraphNodeView.__call__ / MultiDiGraphNodeView.__call__
materialized a frozen list.

Sweep: 6639 passed, 0 failed (+14 new regression tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
